TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-pear4_tosi_ masin

S.TRANSL: 公雞啼了。
A rooster crowed.

S.FORM: baki' e 'aehae' rima' rokrok ka boway rokrok ka boway.
S.TRANSL: 一個老人去摘水果。
An old man went to pick fruits.
有三籃在那裡。
Three baskets were there.
(他)繼續摘水果。
(He) kept on picking fruits.
有一個袋子裝滿了。
There was one bag which was full (of fruits).
(他)還在繼續摘。
(He) kept on picking (fruits).

S.FORM: sahae' ila mayhae'hae' ila ray 'obos o: sahae' 'aehae'.
S.TRANSL: (袋子)滿了有一顆水果掉下來。
(The bag) which was full fell down.
他下來而且(把水果)放下來。
He came down and put down (the fruits).
有兩籃滿了。
Two baskets were full.
一個(水果)掉出籃子來(他就)拿(了)。
One (fruit) fell down from the basket and (he) took (it).
用手帕把它擦一擦。
Wiped it with a handkerchief.
把它放回籃子。
Put (it) back in the basket.

S.FORM: m mwa:i' 'aehae' ka kamanra:an 'ima hoehoeh ka katin.
S.TRANSL: 有一個男人拉著一頭牛過來。
A man coming; (he) was pulling a cow.

S.FORM: may 'isaza kita' ka boway rokrok ka katin iya si'ael nisia hoehoehen hoehoeen lososo:i.
S.TRANSL: 看到牛可能想要吃水果, 他把它(從那籃水果子旁)拖走。
Seeing the cow might have wanted to eat the fruits that had been picked, he dragged it past (the basket with fruits).
他們走了。
(Off) they went.

S.FORM: o: rima' ila hiza kita'en mwa:i' ila naehaen 'aehae' ka kamo'alay kamo'alay 'ima papama' ray kapapama'an.
S.TRANSL: 他們走了. 又看到另一個男孩子來了; 他騎著腳踏車。
(Off) they went. (Then I) see another boy coming; he was riding a bike."
兩隻腳踩腳踏車。
(the kind of) vehicle (of which) two legs turn.

S.FORM: may may isaza kita' hi baki' 'ima rokrok ray kaehoey babaw.
S.TRANSL: 經過那裡看到老人在樹上面摘水果。
There (he) saw the old man picking fruits on top of the tree.

S.FORM: 'okay kita' isaa kita' ka hini boway.
S.TRANSL: (他)東張西望, 沒有看到(那個老人)。 (他)看到水果。
(He) looked around and did not see (the man). (He) saw the fruits.
(他)喜歡籃子裡的(水果)。
(He) liked (the fruits) in the basket.
(他就)拿了(一籃)。
(He) took (a basket).

S.FORM: kaSna' 'ima nia kapapama'an pakalbenen kita' sisilin 'aehae' kala' 'askanen ray kapapama'an nisia karma'en 'araSen ila.
S.TRANSL: (他)放下它的腳踏車, (我)看到(他)提起一籃水果放到它的車上. (然後)他騎他(載著)偷走(的水果)的腳踏車走了。
(He) put down his bike and (I) saw (him) lift one basket on (his) bike. (And then) he (rode) his bike and left (with that blasket).
(男孩)很快的離開。
(The boy) left quickly.

S.FORM: kita'en sasbong ila ka kabinao' noka kapapama'an.
S.TRANSL: (我)看到他撞到騎腳踏車的女孩。
(I) saw him run into a girl on a bike.
他們的腳踏車撞在一起。
Their bikes bumped (into something/each other).
男孩東張西望, 就撞到那女孩。
The boy looked around and bumped into the girl.
(水果)全部掉了。
(The fruits) are gone.

S.FORM: rokrokon ray kala' isa'an 'aehae' mae'iyaeh mwa:i' poehpoeh ka kaybae:en.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們就把水果放進籃子裡 有一個人過來拍掉他衣服上的灰塵。
And then (they were putting the fruits that had been picked) into the basket. A person came to shake the dirt off (his) clothes.

S.FORM: mwa:i' ila sia sisilin tatilhaehael sisilin ray kapapama'an.
S.TRANSL: 有一個男孩過來幫忙把籃子提到腳踏車上。
(There) came (a boy who) helped lift (the basket) onto the bike.

S.FORM: rima' ila lasia to:o' mae'iyaeh ma' 'ima sasiwazay.
S.TRANSL: 那三個人離開, 然後他們就分開了。
The three persons left and they parted ways.

S.FORM: o: hiza to:o' mae'iyaeh kita' hiza ka tatpo'.
S.TRANSL: 那三個人看到一個帽子在那裡。
The three persons saw a hat there.

S.FORM: e singowip ila nisia ka tatpo nisia si'oe'oe koSa'en o: niSo tatpo' hini.
S.TRANSL: 男孩忘了他的帽子。 有一個小孩就叫他, 然後說"這是你的帽子"。
(The boy) forgot his hat. (One of the three children) called him and said, "this is your hat.

S.FORM: mari'in lobih rima' minobih ka mobay ka tatpo'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩回頭把帽子還給他。
The child returned and went to give him back the hat.

S.FORM: o: 'ima koSa: ma'alo isaa bowayen papna'aehae' ka boway to:o' to:o' mae'iyaeh isaa lasia.
S.TRANSL: 他謝謝那些小孩。然後給他們三人每人一個水果, 然後就離開。
(He) thanked (the children) and gave each of the three a fruit; then they left.
男孩離開了。
The boy left.

S.FORM: hiza baki' 'ima rokrok ka boway kasra:i' ila.
S.TRANSL: 那個摘水果的老人從樹上爬下來。
The old man picking fruits there climbed down (the tree).

S.FORM: koSa: hayno' ila ma'an kala' hini' 'ima to:o' o: 'am 'aehae' 'ima mayhae'hae' ray kala' hayno' ila.
S.TRANSL: 有一個裝滿水果的籃子哪裡去了?
Where are my baskets here? There were three. One basket was filled with fruits. Where is it?
每個人手上都有一個水果。
Each with a fruit on his hand.
沒有了 哈哈哈。
That's all. Hahaha.
